company.name_jp: ソリューション・ラボ・ジャパン株式会社

research_notes: Research date: 2026-06-26. Website https://www.slj-net.co.jp/ accessible. Founded 1992. Capital: 100M JPY. 216 employees. President: 森原達夫. IBM infrastructure specialist. HQ in Yokohama Noge-Chome. Offices in Tokyo, Fukuoka, Osaka. ISMS & Privacy Mark certified. KIA member. Name changed to SLJ in 2022.
